summary: Re-tested all 8 requested UI/responsive changes for Gossip Cafe Krakow landing page on the public preview URL across viewports 390/640/768/1920px. All requested features pass: PL is default language (lang-btn-pl active, hero shows 'Poranki, ktore smakuja inaczej'), language switcher works (EN/PL/DE all update hero title), navbar uses light text + brown-tinted gradient over hero at top and switches to dark text + blurred light background after scrolling past 24px, green accent #2F6042 (rgb(47,96,66)) is applied to navbar-book-btn, hero-book-btn, res-submit-btn and all menu prices, reservation form submission emits console.log 'Gossip Cafe - New Reservation Request:' + shows Sonner success toast + clears all fields, Gallery shows horizontal scroll carousel (gallery-carousel with 5 slides) on mobile 390px and bento grid (5 images) on desktop, Offer shows horizontal carousel on mobile (<640px) and 2/3-col grid on >=640px, About is stacked on mobile and 2-col side-by-side from 640px+, Menu image is single column with aspect-[21/9] (shorter height) between 640-767px and switches to 2-col with portrait image at 768px+. No console errors and no page errors detected.
critical_code_review_comments: OfferSection.jsx renders the same offer cards twice in the DOM (once in sm:hidden mobile carousel and once in hidden sm:grid desktop grid) with identical data-testid values offer-card-0..5 each. The duplicate testids result in 12 total elements matching [data-testid^='offer-card-'] even though only 6 are visible per breakpoint. Functionally fine because only one set is visible at a time, but test selectors that count occurrences will be misleading. Consider using suffixes like offer-card-mobile-{i} and offer-card-desktop-{i}, or rendering one list and toggling layout via CSS only.

Language preference still not persisted across reloads (LanguageContext uses in-memory useState only). Default is now 'pl' as requested, but if user manually switches to EN/DE and refreshes, it reverts to PL. Consider persisting to localStorage if desired.

Reservation form Select (guests) uses the 'required' prop on the Radix Select wrapper, but native form validation does not enforce it - submitting with empty guests/date still succeeds and emits a payload with empty strings. Acceptable for the mocked flow but should be tightened before any real submission backend.
Reservation.jsx logs raw user PII (name/phone) to console.log by design - remove before production deploy.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://krakow-bistro-hub.preview.emergentagent.com. All 8 requested UI/responsive changes verified via Playwright at viewports 390/640/768/1920. Green accent color #2F6042 = rgb(47,96,66) - useful constant for color regression checks. Reservation: select res-guest-option-{i} with force=True (Radix overlay), calendar uses button[name='day']:not([disabled]). Mobile breakpoints: gallery carousel visible <768px (md:hidden), offer carousel visible <640px (sm:hidden). Note duplicate offer-card-{i} testids - filter by .is_visible() if counting. No backend; reservation only console.logs by design (mocked).
rca of the issue: No bugs found - all 8 requested changes implemented correctly and verified across required viewports.
